evidence.scientific_clarity: Violin+box overlay clearly shows Control > Drug-A 10uM > Drug-A 50uM ≈ Combo rank ordering; jittered points and significance brackets convey the scientific claim effectively.
evidence.typography: Script never sets pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype='none'; PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type3 (paths, not selectable text); SVG text is also rendered as paths — both formats lose editability.
evidence.palette: Blue/green/red/purple color set is mostly CB-safe (avoids pure red-green conflict), but green (#55A868) for Drug-A 10uM and red (#C44E52) for Drug-A 50uM introduce a directional colour pair that readers may misread as up/down rather than dose-level differences.
evidence.layout_density: Compact 6.5×4.5-inch figure, violins fill x-range well, y-axis auto-scaled with bracket headroom; no excessive whitespace or overlapping labels detected.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption accurately matches the figure and includes a specific directional finding; no legend is present (not needed here), but the caption omits the actual p-values/exact medians a Reviewer 2 would request.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is real vector (streams present, not raster-embedded) but uses Type3 font rendering (DejaVu Sans converted to outlines); text is NOT selectable/searchable. Script lacks rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42 and rcParams['svg.fonttype']='none'.
evidence.file_format: All four required files exist and are non-trivial: figure.pdf (28 KB), figure.png (154 KB), figure.svg (94 KB), caption.tex, gen_figure.py.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption explains violin/box/whisker/jitter anatomy, states significance brackets with Mann-Whitney U, names legend for asterisks, and states a specific directional finding (Drug-A 50 µM and Combo show strong, significant reductions). Solid.

overall_strengths: Complete, well-constructed violin+box+jitter+significance-bracket figure that faithfully executes the brief's scientific intent and is visually clean.
Caption is thorough: it defines all visual elements, specifies the statistical test, provides the asterisk legend, and states a concrete directional finding.
overall_weaknesses: Font rendering is broken for vector export: neither pdf.fonttype=42 nor svg.fonttype='none' is set, so all text is converted to Type3 outline paths — not selectable or editable by a journal production team.

Green/red colour pairing for dose levels (Drug-A 10 µM vs 50 µM) risks directional misreading and mild colour-blind confusion; a sequential single-hue palette or perceptually uniform ramp would be more appropriate for an ordered dose series.
